name: air-fryer-xo-fish-balls-in-honey
Seasoning: ['3 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee XO Sauce (oil removed)', '2 Tbsp. honey']

name: beef-and-broccoli-stir-fry
Ingredients: ['1 lb. broccoli florets', '1 lb. flank steak', '2 Tbsp. vegetable oil', '2 ea. garlic cloves, minced', '2 cups rice for serving (optional)', 'sesame seeds, for garnish (optional) ', 'cilantro, for garnish (optional) ', 'scallion, for garnish (optional)  ', 'microgreens, for garnish (optional)']
Marinade: ['1 tsp. baking soda    ', '1 tsp. cornstarch    ', '1 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Cooking Soy Sauce      ', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Pure Sesame Oil']
Sauce Mix: ['2 oz. Lee Kum Kee Panda Brand Oyster Flavored Sauce', '2 tsp. Chinese rice wine (or white wine)', '1 tsp. Lee Kum Kee Chicken Bouillon ', '1/3 cup water', '1 tsp. cornstarch']

name: pasta-linguine-beef-and-oyster-flavored-sauce
Ingredients: ['2 oz. zucchini, cut into 1/2"" strips ', '2 oz. carrots, cut into 1/2"" strips ', '4 oz. mushrooms , sliced ', '16 oz. linguine, or other pasta ', '3 Tbsp. cooking oil ', '1 oz. green onion, for decoration ', '8 oz. top sirloin steak, cut into thin strips']

name: sauteed-fish-with-black-bean-garlic-sauce
Ingredients: ['8 oz. red snapper fillets, cut into 1-inch cubes', '3 Tbsp. oil, separated', '4 oz. asparagus, cut into ½-inch diagonal pieces', '(Optional) ½ oz. red bell pepper, for garnish']
Seasoning: ['1 ½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Black Bean Garlic Sauce']

name: seafood-and-tofu-soup
Ingredients: ['4 oz. mixed seafood', '1/2 box tofu, diced   ', '1 egg, beaten', '4 cups water', '2 Tbsp. cornstarch-water mixture']
Seasoning: ['3 Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon']

name: steamed-eggs-with-shiitake-mushrooms
Ingredients: ['6 eggs', '2 oz. dried shiitake mushrooms', '2 Tbsp. green onion, finely chopped', '3 cups/750ml water']
Seasoning: ['2½ Tbsp. Lee Kum Kee Concentrated Chicken Bouillon']
